苏浅.appearance: 1girl, solo, long black hair, loose hair, peach blossom eyes, beauty mark, pale skin, E-cup breasts, light blue sundress, white canvas shoes, {happy smile}, {{blushing}}, sitting, holding chopsticks, traditional Chinese courtyard, night scene, lantern lighting, osmanthus tree, starry sky, warm atmosphere
苏浅.desc: 黑色长发随意披散,桃花眼明亮幸福,右眼角下泪痣,肤色白皙,身材丰腴,浅蓝色吊带裙,白色帆布鞋,坐在天井圆桌边,手持筷子,脸颊微红带着幸福的笑容,背景是传统中式庭院,头顶桂花树,星光点点,暖黄色灯光,氛围温馨宁静
